title: Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A delicious and flavorful skewer recipe featuring marinated beef, spring onions, and fresh herbs. Perfect for a summer barbecue.
instructions: Cut the flank steak into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, combine the beef cubes, spring onions, parsley, oregano, garlic, red pepper flakes, red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to coat the beef cubes evenly.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as grilled vegetables or a salad.
